title: Force Fair-Play
body:
This mod can be used for servers (also works on client) to enforce the Fair-Play mode of Xaero's map mods. 
This works by sending the strings "§f§a§i§r§x§a§e§r§o" and "§x§a§e§r§o§w§m§n§e§t§h§e§r§i§s§f§a§i§r" to every player joining the game.

If you have any questions, ask me on my [discord](https://discord.gg/F96f9ZneU4).
